channel-type.label: Send Notification
channel-type.description: Send notification to the client

channel-type.label: Playing Item Id
channel-type.description: Id of the item currently playing

channel-type.label: Playing Item Name
channel-type.description: Name of the item currently playing

channel-type.label: Playing Item Series Name
channel-type.description: Name of the item's series currently playing, only have value when item is an episode

channel-type.label: Playing Item Season Name
channel-type.description: Name of the item's season currently playing, only have value when item is an episode

channel-type.label: Playing Item Season
channel-type.description: Number of the item's season currently playing, only have value when item is an episode

channel-type.label: Playing Item Episode
channel-type.description: Number of the episode item currently playing, only have value when item is an episode

channel-type.label: Playing Item Genders
channel-type.description: Coma separate list genders of the item currently playing

channel-type.label: Playing Item Type
channel-type.description: Type of the item currently playing

channel-type.label: Playing Item Percentage
channel-type.description: Played percentage for the item currently playing, allow seek

channel-type.label: Playing Item Second
channel-type.description: Current second for the item currently playing, allow seek

channel-type.label: Playing Item Total Seconds
channel-type.description: Total seconds for the item currently playing

channel-type.label: Play By Terms
channel-type.description: Play media by terms, works for series, episodes and movies

channel-type.label: Play Next By Terms
channel-type.description: Add to playback queue as next by terms; works for series, episodes and movies

channel-type.label: Play Last By Terms
channel-type.description: Add to playback queue as last by terms; works for series, episodes and movies

channel-type.label: Browse By Terms
channel-type.description: Browse media by terms, works for series, episodes and movies

channel-type.label: Play By Id
channel-type.description: Play media by id

channel-type.label: Play Next By Id
channel-type.description: Add to playback queue as next by id

channel-type.label: Play Last By Id
channel-type.description: Add to playback queue as last by id

channel-type.label: Browse By Id
channel-type.description: Browse media by id
